SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class ReservationUpdateResultDTO

java.lang.Object
common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ReservationUpdateResultDTO extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a successful RequestType.UPDATE_RESERVATION: the freshly persisted ReservationDTO bundled with the price before and after the edit, so the client can settle the difference.

Rescheduling can change the party size and therefore the price. The server recomputes price_cents as part of the update and reports both the oldPriceCents and the newPriceCents here; the client derives delta = newPriceCents - oldPriceCents to decide whether to collect the difference (prepaid, price up), refund it (prepaid, price down) or simply quote the new total due at the gate (pay-on-arrival). The updated reservation already carries the new price and the paidInAdvance flag the settlement wording depends on.

Carried in ServerResponse.getData() for the update reply only. The realtime ServerEvent push still carries the plain ReservationDTO, since subscribers refresh from the new row and do not settle.

See Also:
